mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, status, createtime, updatetime) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update user set nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, updatetime = now() where id = #{id}
update user set password = #{password}, updatetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from user order by id desc
select id, username, email, status, createtime as createdAt from user order by id desc
